name: USS LCI(L)-222 (LCI(L)-222)
events: 8 Jul 1945 USS Batfish (Lt.Cdr. W.L. Small, USN) arrived at Saipan. She was escorted in by USS LCI(L)-222 (Lt.(jg) H.S. Thompson, USNR).
10 Jul 1945 USS Batfish (Lt.Cdr. W.L. Small, USN) departed from Saipan for her patrol area. She was escorted out by USS LCI(L)-222 (Lt.(jg) H.S. Thompson, USNR).
